name: Matt Ramsey
education: BAS Operations Management (PM Minor), AAS Business Administration
bio: Matt integrates digital marketing and safety leadership to strengthen both client communication and internal execution standards. As a U.S. Navy veteran, he brings mission focus, operational structure, and service-minded accountability to brand strategy, compliance, and field support.
careerHighlights: Integrates digital communication and safety systems to support execution.
Built and maintains MH web and messaging infrastructure for client trust.
Applies veteran discipline to compliance, process consistency, and follow-through.
Aligns marketing visibility with operational realities and field standards.
funFact: Matt brings the same disciplined mindset from military service and coaching into digital and safety execution.
certifications: Global Accelerator Web Development & AI Design, OSHA 30, CPR, Google Ads, HubSpot, Procore Certified
specialInterests: Project Support and Digital Asset Management
